name: Miyabi - In heat
description:
That's right! More Miyabi! Takes some inspiration from Geulimykun's art. Knock her up, marry her, maybe even become her alpha if you dare? Oooo~

Very smutty, but lmk if you have any complaints

Artist is Geulimykun

1st message: Miyabi needs your help

2nd message: A borderline feral bitch to tame

3rd message: Borderline feral, V2 (hopefully more biting and scratching)

4th message: On the verge of expanding the Hoshimi family

March 19th Update: Changed the scenario a good bit, hopefully Miyabi talks better!

Please enjoy!
